assignment_procedure: Synthetic students are assigned in equal numbers to all four cells.
causal_scope: Causal interpretation is conditional on random assignment, implementation fidelity, and the defined factor levels.
missingness_rule: The registered dataset contains all four cells with equal counts and no missing outcomes.
research_question: Does the effect of study strategy on assessment performance depend on the feedback condition?
row_structure: One row per student with exactly one valid strategy-by-feedback cell.
